36.gl: properly, to pale, i.e. by implication to be ashamed; also (by implication) to be disappointed or delayed
36.kj: (be, make, bring to, cause, put to, with, a-) shamed(-d), be (put to) confounded(-fusion), become dry, delay, be long.
